Screenshot: VirtualBox

Now reading bug 263407, I can't recall whether there's a way to make this bug 263501 consistently reproducible …


(In reply to Mason Loring Bliss from comment #3)

I stumbled across a '263501-zdb' virtual machine, it took me a few hours to remember the GELI passphrase. 

In the attached screenshot, I'm midway through an upgrade from 13.1-RC4 to 13.1-RELEASE-p3 (still free from the bug).
